essence: Collects and transports household and commercial waste, keeping communities clean, safe, and functioning.

identity.title: Waste Collection Operative
identity.summary: Works as part of a team to collect household, commercial, and recycling waste, ensuring safe and efficient disposal.

salary.notes: Team leaders, HGV‑licensed operatives, and commercial waste specialists can exceed £35k-£40k+.

qualifications: Ability to work outdoors in all conditions
Optional HGV licence for driving collection vehicles

lifestyle.description: Waste collection operatives work early mornings and outdoors, collecting household and commercial waste, sorting recycling, and ensuring safe handling of materials. The role is physical, fast‑paced, and essential to public health and community cleanliness. It suits individuals who enjoy teamwork, routine, and active outdoor work.

habits: Follows strict safety and hygiene procedures
Communicates clearly with the driver and team
Keeps routes organised and on schedule
Maintains awareness of surroundings and traffic
